Overview metrics: totals, settled volume, webhook health, 30-day series

info.title: Cosmos Pay — Payments API
info.description: Payments microservice (Stellar payment intents). All endpoints require traffic to arrive through the APISIX gateway: a valid `X-Gateway-Secret` header plus an authenticated consumer (`X-Consumer-Username`). Paths already include the version (`/v1/...`).

source.description: Payer's Stellar account — the transaction source.

amount.description: Amount as a decimal string (max 7 decimals).

assetCode.description: Asset code. Omit (or "XLM"/"native") for native lumens.

assetIssuer.description: Issuer account for a non-native asset.

memo.description: MEMO_ID (numeric uint64) for idempotency + on-chain identification. Auto-generated when omitted.

msg.description: SEP-7 `msg`: shown to the user in their wallet (≤ 300 chars).

callback.description: SEP-7 `callback` where the wallet POSTs the signed XDR, e.g. `url:https://...`.

amount.description: Amount the destination should receive. Omit to let the user enter it (e.g. donations).

assetCode.description: Asset code the destination receives. Omit for native lumens (XLM).

assetIssuer.description: Issuer account for a non-native asset.

memo.description: MEMO_ID (numeric uint64) for idempotency + on-chain identification. Auto-generated when omitted.

msg.description: SEP-7 `msg`: shown to the user in their wallet (≤ 300 chars).

xdr.description: Unsigned transaction envelope (null for PAY intents).

uri.description: SEP-7 deep link (`tx` for TX intents, `pay` for PAY intents).

qr.description: QR code of the SEP-7 URI (PNG data URL), derived on read.

txHash.description: Hash of the submitted Stellar transaction to validate against this intent.

reason.description: Why validation failed, when `valid` is false.

txHash.description: Stellar transaction hash once the signed tx is submitted.

url.description: HTTPS URL that will receive POSTed event notifications.

eventTypes.description: Event types to subscribe to. Omit/empty to receive all events.

secret.description: HMAC signing secret — shown once. Store it securely.

amount.description: Decimal price (≤ 7 decimals). Omit for a customer-set amount.

assetCode.description: Asset code the price is in. Omit for native lumens (XLM).

amount.description: Decimal price (≤ 7 decimals). Omit for a customer-set amount.

assetCode.description: Asset code the price is in. Omit for native lumens (XLM).

account.description: Optional Stellar account to associate the customer with.
Optional Stellar account to associate the customer with.
